title: Lunglei District-ah Enumeration Form Digitisation zawh fel a ni
content:
Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 22:Electoral Roll en nawn runpui, Special Intensive Revision (SIR), 2026 kalpui mekah zanin tlai dar 6:00 khan Lunglei District chhunga assembly constituency paruk – 30-Lunglei North, 31-Lunglei East, 32-Lunglei West, 33-Lunglei South, 34-Thorang leh 35-West Tuipui te chuan Enumeration Form endik leh online portal-a chhut luh (digitisation) an zo fel.

Lunglei District hnuaia assembly constituency parukah hian polling station 180 awmin, vote nei mi 1,03,037 an awm a. Booth Level Officer (BLO)-te’n anmahni bial ṭheuhva voter tin hnena Enumeration Form an sem aṭangin voter 98,768 te Enumeration Form chu lak let (collect) niin, chu chu 95.86% a ni a. Voter Enumeration Form pek chhuah, chhan hrang hrang avanga lak let theih tawh loh (Uncollectable Enumeration Form), ASDD [vote neihna hmuna awm tawh lo (absent), insawn (shifted), mitthi (dead) leh awm nawn palh (duplicate)] anga chhinchhiah mi 4,269 (4.14%) an awm bawk.

30-Lunglei North-a voter 18,076 awm aṭangin EF 17,479 lak let niin, lak let theih loh 597 a awm a. 31-Lunglei East-a voter 16,489 awm aṭangin EF 15,765 lak let niin, lak let theih loh 724 a awm a. 32-Lunglei West-a voter 15,974 awm aṭangin EF 15,292 lak let niin, lak let theih loh 682 a awm a. 33-Lunglei South-a voter 19,433 awm aṭangin EF 18,684 lak let niin, lak let theih loh 749 a awm a. 34-Thorang-a voter 15,644 awm aṭangin EF 15,031 lak let niin, lak let theih loh 613 a awm a. 35-West Tuipui-a voter 17,421 awm aṭangin EF 16,517 lak let niin, lak let theih loh 904 a awm.

Lunglei District Election Officer Pi Navneet Mann chuan a hun taka Enumeration Form sem chhuah, dah khah, lak khawm leh chin fel zawh a nih theih nana thawktu zawng zawng – Election Official te, Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) leh Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) te, BLO Supervisor, BLO leh Assistant BLO te, Election Branch-a thawktute, Booth Level Agent (BLA) te, Local/Village Council, tlawmngai pawl, political party, thu thar theh darhtu leh mi lar (influencer) te bakah, District mipui zawng zawng chungah lawm thu a sawi a. SIR hlawhtling taka kalpui chhunzawm a nih theih nan mi tinte ṭawiawmna leh thawhpuina a ngen nghal bawk.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER AND NHIDCL MANAGING DIRECTOR REVIEW NATIONAL HIGHWAY PROJECTS IN MIZORAM
content:
194/2026-2027

Aizawl, 22 June 2026:Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma today held a review meeting with Dr. Krishan Kumar, Managing Director of the National Highways & Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited (NHIDCL), at the Chief Minister's Conference Hall to assess the progress of various NHIDCL projects in Mizoram.

The meeting was attended by Shri Vanlalhlana, Minister for Public Works Department; Shri Lalthansanga, Minister for Environment, Forests & Climate Change; Advisers to the Chief Minister Shri TBC Lalvenchhunga, Shri H. Ginzalal and Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah; and senior government officials. Deputy Commissioners and Competent Authorities for Land Acquisition (CALAs) also joined the meeting virtually.

Key issues discussed during the meeting included:

Aizawl–Thenzawl National Highway: The process of selecting a consultant for preparation of the Detailed Project Report (DPR) is underway, and the tender is expected to be opened by the end of this month. Dr. Krishan Kumar stated that efforts are being made to finalize the alignment within this year and obtain sanction for the project next year.

Seling–Tipaimukh National Highway: The Chief Minister emphasized the need for immediate restoration of the Tuirini and Tuivai bridges. As construction of permanent bridges will take considerable time, it was suggested that the existing bridges be strengthened and repaired at the earliest.

NH-6 (Vairengte–Sairang): Discussions were held on repair and maintenance works along the existing highway. NHIDCL informed that improvement works from Khamrang to Sairang have been completed, while works on the Kolasib section are continuing. It was expressed that disruptions experienced last year should not recur this year.

Tlabung–Kawrpuichhuah Road: It was noted that this road is to be handed over to NHIDCL, and the need for expediting the process was emphasized.

Ongoing National Highway Projects issues: The meeting reviewed issues relating to the construction of the four-lane Vairengte–Sairang/Aizawl National Highway as well as the Aizawl–Tuipang National Highway. Measures for resolving various challenges were discussed and agreed upon.

Reconstruction of Church and School Buildings at Thingfal: The Deputy Commissioner of Lunglei has submitted a proposal for reconstruction of a church and relocation of school buildings affected by highway construction at Thingfal village. Dr. Krishan Kumar assured that the proposal would be examined.

Old National Highway Sections: The meeting discussed the transfer of old highway stretches that have been bypassed due to new alignments. NHIDCL informed that sections where one-time improvement works have already been completed will be handed over to the State PWD. For sections where such improvements have not yet been carried out, NHIDCL will undertake the works before transferring them to the State Government.

Other Issues: NHIDCL also highlighted various challenges encountered during the implementation of its projects in the State, and possible solutions were discussed.

This version follows standard government press release style and language.

title: CHIEF MINISTER LEH MD NHIDCL IN MIZORAMA NHIDCL HNATHAWHTE THLIRHONA [REVIEW MEETING] NEI
content:
1121/2026-2027

Aizawl the 22nd June 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan CM Conference Hall-ah Dr. Krishan Kumar, MD, NHIDCL chu Mizorama NHIDCL hnathawh hrang hrangte thlirhona (Review) meeting a neihpui a, Chief Minister hi Pu Vanlalhlana, PWD Minister, Pu Lalthansanga, EF & CC Minister,  Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga, Pu H. Ginzalal leh Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, Advisers to CM te, official pawimawhten an tawiawm a. DC leh CALA ten online-in an zawm ve bawk.

1. Aizawl - Thenzawl Road National Highway-a siam tura DPR siamtu tur zawn mek a ni a. Tender hi tun thla tawpah hawn a ni ang. Dr. Krishan Kumar hian, Alignment hi kumina peih fel kan lo tum ang a, nakkumah sanction neih hman kan lo tum dawn nia, a ti.

2. Seling - Tipaimukh National Highway-a Tuirini lei leh Tuivai lei chu a rang lama siam that a tul thu Chief Minister hian a sawi a. Permanent Bridge siam tura hun eng emaw chen a mamawh rih dawn avangin, tuna bridge awmsa hi a ranglama thuam that phawt ni se, an ti.

3. NH 6, Vairengte - Sairang kawngpui repair and maintenance chungchang an sawi a. Khamrang to Sairang siam that hna hi an thawk zo tawh a, Kolasib lam section pawh an thawh zel thu an sawi. Nikum lama harsatna ang kha kuminah chuan a thleng lo tura ngaih a ni.

4. NH Tlabung - Kawrpuichhuah hi NHIDCL kuta dah tawh tur a ni a. Tihfel thuai ni se, an ti.

5. Four Lane National Highway Vairengte - Sairang/Aizawl hnathawh meka harsatna hrang hrang te,  Aizawl - Tuipang NH thawh mek te an sawi a. Harsatnate chu a rang lama chinfel dan tur an sawi nghal a ni.

6. Thingfal khuaa Biak In chim leh School sawn ngaite sak thatna tur DC Lunglei-in proposal a thehluh chu Dr. Krishan Kumar hian a lo enchian tur thu Chief Minister hi a hrilh.

7. National Highway laih tharin a hèl, National Highway hlui lo ni ta hmun thenkhat NHIDCL lamin one time improvement an tih hnua state PWD hnena hlan tur chungchang an sawi a. NHIDCL lamin one time improvement a lo tih tawh te chu state sorkara hlan an ni ang a. A la tih loh te chu NHIDCL hian an thawk phawt ang a, state sorkarah a hlan ang.

8.  Heng bakah hian hna an thawhna lama NHIDCL in harsatna an tawhte pawh an sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: ICT Department chuan PMJVK hnuaia IT Skill Development & Training Centre-te chu School Education leh Higher & Technical Education Department te hnenah a hlan
content:
1120/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 22nd June 2026:Vawiin khan Information & Communication Technology (ICT) Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana kaihhruainain ICT Department chuan Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK) hnuaia din IT Skill Development & Training Centre-te chu School Education Department leh Higher & Technical Education Department te hnenah a hlan fel a. Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) an ziak a ni.

He programme-ah hian ICT Secretary Dr YLN Reddy, Higher & Technical Education Department Commissioner & Secretary Dr. Lalrozama, School Education Department Secretary Pi Ramdinliani, bakah Secretariat leh Directorate-a thawktu pawimawhte an tel a. MoA sign zawhah hian project chu a hmangtu tur department-te hnenah hlan nghal a ni.

He project hi “Establishment of IT Skill Development & Training Centres in Minority Concentration Areas of Mizoram under PMJVK” tih a ni a. ICT Department hnuaia Mizoram State e-Governance Society (MSeGS) hnuaia kalpui a ni. Project zawng zawng atana sum hman chu cheng vaibelchhe 6.93 (site khatah cheng nuai 99) a ni a, Central leh state in 90:10 in an in chawi sem a ni. He project hi Minority Concentration Area-a chengte, zirlaite leh zirtirtute tan computer leh digital thiamna, computer zirna tha zawk leh technology hman kawngah hmasawnna siam tumna a ni.

IT Skill Development & Training Centre-te hi Mizoram chhunga hmun 7-ah din a ni a. College hrang hrang - Government Kamalanagar College, Chawngte, Lawngtlai District; Government Zawlnuam College, Zawlnuam, Mamit District ah te dah a ni. Heng bakah hian Government Diltlang High School, Diltlang, Lawngtlai District; Government Bungtlang South High School, Bungtlang South, Lawngtlai District; Sports School Campus, West Phaileng, Mamit District; Government Lungsen High School, Lungsen, Lunglei District; Government Bunghmun High School, West Bunghmun, Lunglei District ah te dah a ni bawk.

Bungraw pekte chu:

Trainer Laptop – 1Trainee Computer System – 50Online UPS (5 KVA) – 1Digital Multifunctional Copier Machine – 1Smartboard with CPU – 1Digital Podium – 1Local Area Network (LAN) FacilityProject DinhmunCivil works – 100% zawhfelIT equipment installation – 100% zawhfelFinancial Progress – 100%Geo-tagging – 100%

Project hi a kimchangin zawhfel tawh a ni a, zirlaite, zirtirtute leh mipuite hman nghal theih turin peih fel a ni. He project inhlan chhawnna hi Mizoram sawrkarin ICT zirna leh thiamna hmasawnna atan leh technology hmanga zirna tihhmasawnna pawimawh tak a thlen theihna tur atana duan a ni.

Attachment

title: SAIHAPUI 'V' LEH PHAINUAM INKAR KAWNG LIRTHEI TAN KHAR LAILAWK A NI DAWN
content:
1119/2026-2027

Kolasib, 22nd June, 2026:Mizoram State Sawrkar Notification No. B. 12021/10/2004-TRP dt. 01.06.2020 leh Section 115 of Motor Vehicle Act 1988 (Act No. 59 of 1988)-in thuneihna a pek angin, Kolasib Superintendent of Police, Pu Lalrinpuia Varte chuan lirthei chet vel dan tur chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian mipui hriattirna (Public Notice) leh thupek a chhuah.

Saihapui 'V' leh Phainuam inkar Lei (Bridge) chu State Disaster Response Fund – Recovery & Reconstruction window (Phase 4) kaltlangin siam that hna thawh tum a ni a. Chak zawka he Lei siam that hna hi an thawh theih nan June ni 23, 2026 (Thawhlehni) atanga June ni 30, 2026 (Thawhlehni) chhung hian he lai Saihapui 'V' leh Phainuam inkar kawng hi lirthei zawng zawng tan khar (block) lailawk a ni ang.

He thuchhuah chungchanga harsatna neite chuan OC Vairengte PS (Ph. No. 9862786385) emaw Saihapui 'V' Police Checkgate (Ph. No. 7005728279) ah te biak pawh theih reng a ni.

He thupek zawm lo te chu Section 179 MV Act hmanga hrem an ni ang.

title: IPR, P&S Minister-in USA atanga Mizo lehkhabu ziak hmasa ber a tlangzarh
content:
1118/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 22 June 2026 :Vawiin khan IPR, P&S Department changtu Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan a Pisa ah, Indiana , USA-a cheng mek Pu Zo Sanga lehkhabu ziah,‘Genre Hran (Nihphung Danglam)’tih chu a tlangzarh.

Tlangzarh puala hun hmanah hian IPR, P&S Department changtu Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan lehkhabu danglam tak mai tlangzarh tura sawm a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, ram pawna awm Mizo ten Mizoram leh an Mizo puite rawn ngaipawimawha kawng hrang hranga inzawmna an rawn siam thin chu hlu a tih thu a sawi a. America ram atanga Mizo lehkhabu mimal ziah hmasa ber tlangzarhtua a tang chu a ngaihhlut thu sawiin, Genre hran (Nihpung danglam) chu a hming ang ngeiin a danglamin Mizo mipuite tan hlawkna tam tak lehkhabuah chuan chhar tur a awm a rin tlat thu a sawi a ni.

Tlangzarh puala hun hman hi Prof RL Thanmawia, MAL Khaipa chuan kaihruaiin, Dr H. Laldinmawia’n Lehkhabu thlirlawkna a nei a. Thlirlawktu Dr. H. Laldinmawia chuan, “Genre Hran ah hian phek 309 awmin bung 91 zet a awm a, bung tin hi chhiar nuam tawka tawi leh fel a nih bakah mi tin mil a ni” a ti a ni.

Vawiina tlangzarh tak Lehkhabu ziaktu Pu Zo Sanga hi kum 2000 vela USA a chhuk thla a ni a. Tunah hian US Potal Service, Pennsylvania State University ah a thawk mek a ni.

title: Mizoram Governor Inaugurates Key Meetings of Central Agricultural University
content:
193/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 22nd June, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), formally inaugurated three important meetings of the Central Agricultural University (CAU), Imphal - the 15th Research Council Meeting, the 11th Extension Education Council Meeting and the 33rd Academic Council Meeting - at the College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry (CVSc & AH), Selesih, Aizawl today. The meetings are scheduled to be held from June 22 to 24, 2026.

In his inaugural address, Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh described Central Agricultural University as a beacon of agricultural innovation for the entire North East region. He emphasised that the three councils - Research, Extension Education and Academic - comprehensively cover work in laboratories, delivery in the field and learning in the classroom, which truly embodies the essence of “Lab to Land” learning.

The Governor expressed appreciation for CAU’s recently prepared policy document titled “Transformation of the Mizoram Economy from US Dollar 540 Million to US Dollar 6,394 Million @ 2047”. He noted that since Mizoram’s economy is largely agro-based, this comprehensive strategic economic and policy blueprint holds immense potential to shape a bright future for the state. While acknowledging that the shift from a “business as usual” scenario may appear challenging, he expressed confidence that with a true transformation and a clear shift in focus from mere production to actual farmer income, the targets could be achieved well before 2047 if stakeholders aim high and work diligently.

He stressed the need for clear and meaningful roles for districts and communities in agricultural development, ensuring that no one is left behind. The Governor highlighted that agriculture and allied sectors form the backbone of the rural economy and, if managed properly, can play a transformative role in realizing the national vision of Viksit Bharat by 2047. He commended the Central Government’s various initiatives for farmers’ welfare and called for stronger collaboration between scientists, faculty members, researchers and farmers. He urged them to go beyond mere development of new technologies and focus on value addition, entrepreneurship, sustainable livelihood opportunities, market linkages, and eco-friendly practices. He further encouraged innovative ideas and effective outreach programmes to ensure that knowledge and technologies reach farmers at the last mile through awareness campaigns.

Praising the efforts of scientists and experts under CAU in advancing agriculture and allied sectors in Northeast India, the Governor assured his continued support. He expressed hope that the three council meetings would yield fruitful outcomes, stating “The future of the North Eastern Region and a prosperous Viksit Bharat will be grown in your laboratories, taught in your classrooms and harvested in our fields. Together, let us work with determination so that by 2047, Mizoram and the entire Northeast emerge as models of self-reliant, sustainable and inclusive hill agriculture for the whole nation.”

Dr. Anupam Mishra, Vice-Chancellor of CAU, delivered the welcome address. He described CAU as one of India’s premier agricultural universities and highlighted the tremendous opportunities presented by the diversity of the Northeast for agriculture and allied sciences. He reaffirmed the university’s commitment to working dedicatedly for the welfare of the region and the nation. He informed the gathering that CAU currently operates 13 Constituent Colleges, 6 Krishi Vigyan Kendras (KVKs), 6 Multi Technology Testing Centres and 6 Vocational Training and Testing Centres across the Northeast.

During the event, the Governor formally handed over technologies developed by the College of Community Science, Tura, Meghalaya (under CAU) Strawberry Jam, Litchi Jam and Mango King Chilli Sauce - to Mr. Harshit T., Manager (Marketing Strategy), PRIME Rural, Shillong, Meghalaya. He also officially launched four Comilla Cotton Meditech Products jointly developed by the College of Community Science, Tura and ICAR-CICR, Nagpur. The Governor also distributed lavender and coriander seeds to farmers from Aizawl, Saitual, Serchhip and Champhai districts.

The Governor also released seven important publications brought out by CAU:

1) Transformation of the Mizoram Economy: A Precision Agricultural Extension Blueprint for the Value Engine Cluster, Aligning with Viksit Bharat @2047.

2) The Annual Research Report for 2025-2026.

3) Package of Practices for Cultivation of Horticultural Crops under Protected Cultivation in the North Eastern Hills Region.

4) Patents and Copyrights of CAU.

5) Food Atlas of Meghalaya: Mapping the Foods of the Khasis, Garos and Jaintias.

6) Training Module for Dairy Farmers: A Comprehensive Guide for Modern Dairy Practices.

7) Souvenir on Graduation Day, College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry.

He also visited the exhibition organised by the College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry, Selesih; College of Horticulture, Thenzawl and KVK Aizawl on the occasion.

The event was attended by several distinguished guests, including Prof. Pravat Kumar Roul, Vice-Chancellor, OUAT, Bhubaneswar; Dr. Dipijyoti Rajkhowa, Vice-Chancellor, Assam Agricultural University, Jorhat; Dr. Manmohan Singh Chauhan, former Vice-Chancellor, G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology, Pantnagar; Prof. M.M. Adhikary, former Vice-Chancellor, BCKV, West Bengal; Dr. K.M. Bujarbaruah, former Vice-Chancellor, AAU, Jorhat; Dr. Dheer Singh, Director, ICAR-NDRI, Karnal; Dr. P. Das, former DDG, ICAR and other senior officials.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in Central Agricultural University hnuaia Council pawimawh thutkhawm a hawng
content:
1117/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 22nd June, 2026:Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan Central Agricultural University (CAU), Imphal hnuaia thutkhawm pawimawh tak tak pathum - 15th Research Council Meeting, 11th Extension Education Council Meeting leh 33rd Academic Council Meeting, June 22-24, 2026 chhunga neih tur chu College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry (CVSc& AH) Selesih, Aizawlah Khuallian niin a hawng.

Hawnna puala thu a sawiah Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Central Agricultural University chu hmarchhak state agriculture sector-a hmasawnna thar thlentu pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, Council pawimawh tak tak neih tur 3 - Reserch Council, Extension Education Council leh Academic Council-te chuan laboratory hna, loneitute thleng pha leh classroom zirna thleng a huam kim vek avangin thiamna a tak ngeia hman tangkaina a lantir a ni, a ti a. CAU-in policy kaihhnawih lehkhabu tha tak "Transformation of the Mizoram Economy from US Dollar 540 Millions to US Dollar 6,394 Million @ 2047" an siam chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Mizoram chu agriculture-a innghat a nih avangin he ruahmanna awmze nei leh huapzau tak hian Mizoram hmakhaw eng tak a siam thei dawn a, harsain lang mahse, tih tak takna leh loneitute sum lakluh tipung chung zelin kan hlen theih ngei ka ring a, kan tum phawt chuan kum 2047 hma pawhin kan puitlin theih ngei ka beisei, a ti bawk.

Larsap chuan hmasawn tura district leh khawtlang hrang hrang ten awmze nei taka hma an lak theih nana ruahmanna siam a tul thu leh, tumah hmaih bik awm lova agriculture leh a kaihhnawiha tanlak nasat a tul thu sawiin, agriculture sector chu thingtlanga chengte innghahna mai a ni lova, dik taka kalpui a nih chuan danglamna nasa tak thlen thei leh India ram hmasawn Viksit Bharat siam kawnga tangkai tak a ni, a ti a. Sawrkar laipuiin loneitute hmasawn nan ruahmanna hrang hrang a siam thu leh hemi tihpuiltling tura mithiamte leh loneitute pawh tan ho a tul thu sawiin, scientist, college-a thawkte leh zirbingmi kalkhawmte chu thil thar leh tha zawk ngaihtuah chhuaka loneitute tha taka kaihruai turin a fuih a. Thiamna ten tumah hmaih bik awm lova mitin a thlen phak nan awareness campaign lamah hma la zel turin a fuih a. Thar chhuah ringawtah duh tawk mai lova, a hralhna changtlung tak a awm theih nan a sawngbawlna, tihhmelmawina, entrepreneurship, ei leh in rintlak leh him siam bakah leilung nena inrem dehchhuah lama ngaihtuahna seng turin a chah a ni.

India hmarchhaka agriculture leh a kaihhnawih tihhmasawn kawnga CAU hnuaia mithiam tak takte hmalakna fakawm a tih thu sawiin, Larsap a nih angin a tawiawm zel dawn thu a sawi a. Council pathum meeting tur chuan rah tha tak a chhuah ngei a beisei thu sawiin, India hmarchhak hmasawnna leh Viksit Bharat hlawhtlinna chu peng hrang hrang - laboratory, classroom leh loneitute hnathawhna hmunah a innghah tlat thu a sawi a. Kalkhawmte chu Mizoram leh hmarchhak state ten hma an sawn zel nana theihtawp chhuah puiah a sawm a ni.

Thusawitu dang Dr. Anupam Mishra Vice-Chancellor, CAU chuan he huna kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Central Agricultural University chu India rama agriculture university tha berte zinga mi a nih thu a sawi a. Hmarchhak state-a danglamna nasa tak awm chuan agriculture leh a kaihhnawih tihhmasawn kawngah remchanna nasa tak a pek thu sawiin, hmarchhak leh India ram hmasawn nan an thawk zel dawn tih a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah CAU-in hmarchhak hmun hrang hrangah College 13, KVK 6, Multi Technology Testing Centre 6 leh Vocational Training and Testing Centre 6 a neih mek thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian College of Community Science, Tura, Meghalaya duan chhuah Strawberry Jam, Litchi Jam leh Mango King Chilli Sauce siam dan technology ziahna bu chu thawhdunna thuthlung angin Larsap-in Pu Harshit T., Manager (Marketing Strategy), PRIME Rural, Shillong, Meghalaya kutah a hlan a. College of Community Science, Tura leh ICAR-CICR, Nagpur-te tangkawp siam chhuah Comilla Cotton Meditech product 4 te chu Larsap hian a tlangzarh bawk a. Aizawl, Saitual, Serchhip leh Champhai District atanga lokal loneitute hnenah lavender leh coriander chi a sem nghal bawk.

Heng bakah hian Larsap chuan Central Agricultural University buatsaih lehkhabu pawimawh hrang hrang 7 a tlangzarh, chungte chu;

1) Transformation of the Mizoram Economy: A Precision Agricultural Extension Blueprint for the Value Engine Cluster, Aligning with Viksit Bharat @2047.

2) The Annual Research Report for 2025-2026.

3) Package of Practices for Cultivation of Horticultural Crops under Protected Cultivation in the North Eastern Hills Region.

4) Patents and Copyrights of CAU.

5) Food Atlas of Meghalaya: Mapping the Foods of the Khasis, Garos and Jaintias.

6) Training Module for Dairy Farmers: A Comprehensive Guide for Modern Dairy Practices.

7) Souvenir on Graduation Day, College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry.

Larsap hian College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry, Selesih; College of Horticulture, Thenzawl leh KVK Aizawl ten he ni puala exhibition an buatsaih chu tlawhin a kawm bawk.

He hunah hian Prof. Pravat Kumar Roul, Vice-Chancellor, OUAT, Bhubaneswar; Dr. Dipijyoti Rajkhowa, Vice-Chancellor, Assam Agricultural University, Jorhat; Dr. Manmohan Singh Chauhan, former Vice-Chancellor, G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology, Pantnagar, Uttarakhand; Prof. M.M. Adhikary, former Vice-Chancellor, BCKV, W. Bengal; Dr. K.M. Bujarbaruah, former Vice-Chancellor, AAU, Jorhat, Assam; Dr. Dheer Singh, Director, ICAR-NDRI, Karnal; Dr. P. Das, former DDG, ICAR leh official pawimawh thahnem tak an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: District Level Standing Committee for SIR 2026 thutkhawm hmasa ber Siaha-ah neih a ni
content:
1116/2026-2027

Siaha the 22nd June 2026:District Level Standing Committee for Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Roll- 2026 thutkhawm hmasa ber chu vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Siaha-ah District Election Officer Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte kaihhruaina hnuaiah neih a ni.

Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan EO, ERO leh AERO te, BLO te, political party te leh NGO te thawhhona avangin Enumeration form digitisation zawh fel a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Mizoramah a zo hmasa pawl District an nih theih avangin mawhphurtute chungah lawmthu a sawi. DEO chuan Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chu kum 20 dana neih a ni a, roll siamthat runpui a nih angin paih ngaite paih a, belh ngai kim taka belh an nih theih nan fimkhur chhuah a, theihtawp chhuah a tul a ti. Draft roll chu July Ni 4, 2026 ah chhuah a ni dawn tih tarlangin hmaih palh an awm loh nan uluk taka endikin, siam that ngai awmte chu claims and objections hunah (July Ni 4, 2026 atanga August Ni 4, 2026) siam that a theih dawn a, final roll chu September Ni 6 ah chhuah a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Election Commission of India (ECI) chuan political party te a ngai pawimawh em em a, roll-ah thun tur dik tak thun a, paih ngai paih a nih theih nan leh roll dik, felfai leh thianghlim a awm theih nan theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm bawk.

Election Officer Pu Vabeimozachhi Chozah chuan technical report a pe a, 39-Saiha (ST) AC ah vote nei mi 24,980 an awm a, 40-Palak (ST) AC ah vote nei mi 21,092 awmin Siaha District pumah vote nei mi 46,072 an awm a ti. Enumeration form semchhuah, lak khawm leh digitisation chu June Ni 28 a zawh tur tih chu ERO, AERO leh BLO te thawhhona zarah June ni 18 khan zawh fel a ni a ti a, tha taka thawhpui tute chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

District Level Standing Committee for SIR ah hian District Election Officer chu Chairman a ni a, Election Officer chu Member Secretary a ni thung. 39- Saiha (ST) AC MLA, 40-Palak (ST) AC MLA, Superintendent of Police (SP), ERO, AERO, Executive Secretary MADC, District Education Officer, Sr EO MADC, DIPRO te bakah political party aiawhte, MJA President, MTP/ YMA/ YLA hruaitute member an ni.

Attachment

title: Tlabungah VB–G RAM G chungchang inhrilhfiahna buatsaih a ni
content:
1115/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 22:Sawrkar laipui ruahman angin Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA) thlakna atana July ni 1, 2026 aṭanga hman ṭan tur, Viksit Bharat—Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) [VB–G RAM G] chungchang inhrilhfiahna hun chu vawiin khan Tlabung RD Block huam chhunga Village Employment Council te pualin buatsaih a ni.

Tlabung BDO Confenrence Hall-a he hun hmanah hian Tlabung Block Development Officer (BDO) Pu Moses Lalfakawma Tlau chuan MGNREGA chu titawpin, a aia ṭha zawk tura ruahman VB–G RAM G chu kalpui thuai a nih tur thu a sawi a. He scheme tharah hian kum khata inhlawh theih ni zat tihpun a nih thu leh hna thawh theih tur bithliah pawh zau zawka ruahman a nih tawh thu sawiin, khaw tinin ṭangkai lehzuala hmang ṭheuh turin duhsakna a hlan.

He hunah hian Pu East Vanlal Chhanchhuaha, APO-I chuan VB–G RAM G chungchang a sawi fiah a. Pu T. Lallungawipuia, CA chuan MIS (Management Information System) chungchang zirtirin, Pu F. Vanngurliana, TA chuan scheme kalpui dan tur chungchanga hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang a zirtir a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

VB-G RAM G hi July 2026 aṭanga kalpui ṭan tura ruahman a ni a. MGNREGA-ah ni 100 inhlawhna kalpui a nih laiin, VB–G RAM G-ah chuan ni 125 inhlawhna kalpui a ni tawh dawn a. Hna thawh theih (permissible works) zat pawh 266 aṭangin 318-ah tihsan niin, inhlawhna rate pawh tisang tura ruahman a ni.

title: Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hovin Khawzawl District-a ‘Pluck & Pay Festival’ neih dan tur rel
content:
1114/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 22nd of June, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State (i/c), Tourism Department hovin sawrkar mi pawimawh leh khawtlang aiawhte’n Khawzawl District-a ‘Pluck & Pay Festival (Lo la, lei rawh) hman dan tur chu MINECO-a Tourism Minister office chamber-ah rel a ni a, September ni 23 – 25 chhungin Chawngtlai leh Tualte-ah hman nise an ti.

Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan, “Pluck & Pay kalhmang hi Mizoramah chuan thil thar tak a la ni a, Mizoram Tourism-ah bung thar kan kai thei dawn a, a phurawm takzet a ni.” a ti a. Mizoram sawrkarin mipui leh khawtlang nena tangruala tourism hmasawnna kalpui, ‘community-based tourism’ a uar tih sawiin, Pluck & Pay festival-ah pawh hian department in sumdawn a tum lo a, a thlengtu khuate’n hlawkpui se sawrkar chuan a duh ber thu a sawi a ni.

Meeting chuan ‘Lo la, lei rawh’ tih kutpui chu thlai hrang hrang puitlin hun September thla chawhnu lamah nithum chhung hman nise tiin a rel a. A hawnna hi Tualte ah neih tur niin, Chawngtlai-ah a kharna hun hman nise tih a ni bawk.

Pluck & Pay festival-ah hian a thlengtu khuaa lo leh huanah te kalin, thlai leh theite chu mahni a lovin a lei theih dawn a. Thlai leh thei lawh mai bakah mikhualte tana tih tur hrang hrang – pipu uai, sairawkherh inperhsiak, kalchhet kal etc. te chu a hmunah buatsaih nise tih a ni. Khaw pahnihah hian thlai leh thei bakah thildang chi hrang hrang zawrhchhuahna tur stall siam a ni bawk ang. Tin, a hawnni leh tawp zanah concert buatsaih nise tih a ni bawk.

Meeting chuan state chhung leh pawn thleng pha turin publicity kalpui hma nise a ti a. Tunhnaia tourism event hrang hrang thlirin chhimtu thahnem tak awm tura beisei a nih thu ngaihthlak a ni. Programme kimchang chu Deputy Commissioner, Khawzawl District hovin Organising Committee in an lo rel chhunzawm dawn a ni.

Vawiina meeting-ah hian Tourism leh Horticulture Department hotu te, Deputy Commissioner, Khawzawl District aiawhte bakah Chawngtlai leh Tualte Village Council President te, Event Management Agency aiawh te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee an ṭhu khawm
content:
1113/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 22:Vawiin chawhma khan Lunglei District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC) chu an Chairman, Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm a. Mission AIDS Suraksha (MAS) kalpui mek thlir hovin, Red Ribbon Quiz Competition 2026 buatsaih tur chungchang an sawi ho.

Member Secretary, District AIDS Control Officer Dr K. Lalhmachhuana'n thu ngaihtuah tura chhawp chhuahte a sawi zau va. DISHA Cluster Programme Manager (CPM) Dr Zodinpuii Hrahsel chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin Mission AIDS Suraksha (MAS) kalpui meka Lunglei District dinhmun tlangpui  tar langin, hma lakna kal mek leh hmachhawpte a sawi fiah a. Hlawhtling taka MAS kalpui a nih theih nana rawtna leh ruahmanna hrang hrang sawi ho niin, Red Ribbon Quiz Competition 2026 atana thil ṭul leh ruahmanna hrang hrang sawi ho a ni bawk.

Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan MAS chu HIV/AIDS darh zel tur venna leh HIV veite’n an dinhmun an hriat chian a, enkawlna ṭha tak an dawn theihna tura Ministry of Health & Family Welfare hma lakna thar a nih thu sawiin, Lunglei District-ah hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan Department hrang hrangte chuan thawh hona ṭha tak nen an tih tur ṭheuhte hlen chhuah tum turin a chah a. HIV ven leh enkawl chu hma lakna pawimawh tak a nih thu leh HIV/AIDS kaihhnawiha hma laknaah Lunglei District-a thawktute chuan an thawk ṭha thawkhata a hriat thu sawiin, Lunglei District chu ram dang nena inramri a nih angin fimkhur leh nasa zawka ṭan lak a ṭul thu a sawi a. Quiz Competition chu zirlaite zinga HIV/AIDS chungchang inzirtirna hmanraw ṭha tak a nih thu sawiin, sikul a tam thei ang ber an tel theih nan thawktute leh zirtirtute chu ṭan la turin a chah.

Mission AIDS Suraksha hnuaiah hian Lunglei District-ah 95:95:99 tihlawhtling turin hma lak mek a ni a. 95:95:99-in a tum chu HIV vei (people living with HIV: PLHIV) 95% talin an nihna an inhriat theihna tura zau zawka thisen endik (test) kalpui te, HIV hrik pai 95% talin Antiretroviral Therapy (ART) ṭha taka an lak theih nana hma lak leh ART latu 99% talin an ṭhatpui a, mi dang kai chhawng thei lo khawpa viral load hniam an neih theih nana hma lak te a ni a. Lunglei District hian 1st 95-ah target 1,668 neiin, May 2026 khan 1,418 (85%) an tihlawhtling a; 2nd 95-ah target 1,418 aṭangin 1,250 (88.2%) tihlawhtlingin, 3rd 99-ah taget 1,110 aṭangin 1,053 (94.9%) an tihlawhtling thung a. MAS target tihlawhtling tur hian zirna in leh sawrkar pisa a tam thei ang berah HIV/AIDS chungchang inzirtirna leh endikna (awareness campaign & screening) kalpui bakah, Healthy Lunglei District Campaign hnuaia hma laknaa HIV endik tel te, tlawmngai pawl (NGO) hrang hrang leh kohhrante nena thawh ho te ruahman leh kalpui mek a ni.

Ṭhalai kum 13-17 inkarte zingah HIV/AIDS leh STI/RTI chungchang inzirtirna atan pawl 8, pawl 9 leh pawl 11 zirlaite tan Red Ribbon Quiz Competition kalpui leh tur niin, Lunglei District Level Red Ribbon Quiz Competition hi July 30, 2026-ah School Education Conference Hall, Lungleiah buatsaih ni se, tih a ni a. School level-ah sikul ai awh zirlai pahnih ṭheuh telin, online-in intihsiakna kalpui phawt a ni ang a. Sikul ti ṭha zual 10 chuan district level inelna hmachhawnin, district level-a pakhatna hian state level competition-ah district ai a awh ang a. Regional leh national level thlengin intihsiakna hi buatsaih a ni ang.

title: DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOVIN ERO, AERO LEH BLO-TEN MEETING AN NEI
content:
1112/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 22nd June 2026:Vawiin khan District Election Officer (DEO) leh District Commissioner (DC) ni bawk Er. Lalhriatpuia chuan M.C. Hall, Durtlangah leh Zonuam YMA Hall-ahte Aizawl North I leh Aizawl West I-a Electoral Registration Officer (ERO), Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) leh Booth Level Officer (BLO)-te nen Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chungchangah meeting an nei.

District Election Officer (DEO) chuan Election Commission of India (ECI) in India danpui (Constitution) Article 324 hnuaia SIR a kalpui mekah Mizoram chu India ram state zinga a titha ber kan nih thu a sawi a. He dinhmuna Mizoram a din theih chhan chu thawktute inpekna leh thahnemngaihna vang leh mipuiten sawrkar an thawhpui that vang a nih thu a sawi bawk. BLO-te leh mawhphurhna hrang hrang neitute chu tha taka an tihtur an hlen theihnan duhsakna a hlan bawk a ni.

He hunah hian BLO-te chuan SIR chungchanga an thlen chin te, harsatna an tawh te leh zawhna an neih te sawihona hun an hmang a ni.

title: Mamit-ah Single-use plastic(SUP) hman khap chungchanga hmalak dan tur sawi ho a ni
content:
1111/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 22nd of June,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah khualzinte kal tamnaa (tourist sites) single-use plastic(SUP) hman khap tur chungchangah Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hoin hmalak dan tur relin an thukhawm.

District Bawrhsap chuan Supreme Court ina thuchhuah a siam angin single use plastic(sup) hman khapna chu Mamit district ah pawh kenkawh ngei a tul a ni a ti a, hemi ti hlawhtling tur hian Sawrkar mai ni lo khawtlang hruaitute nen nasa taka tan lak a ngai a ni a ti.

Single-use plastic (sarang vawikhat hmana paih leh mai chi) hman khapna chu a bul tan nan Reieka khualzin kal tamna hmun leh LAD park, Mamit a kenkawh tum a ni a, hemi atan hian mipuite hriattir leh awareness campaign neih tum niin hmalak dan tur sawi ho a ni. District Bawrhsap chuan thla tin SUP inspection neih a nih tur thu sawiin inspection team din a ni a, he team hian report thehlutin thupek zawm lo te chungah hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi.

Pi Betty Lalrinfeli, Reiek BDO chuan Reiek block a SUP hman chungchanga hmalakna leh hmalak tulnaah report a pe a, Pu Lalthuama, DUDO Mamit chuan tawih thei lo leh tawih thei bawlhhlawh paih dan tur chungchang te sawiin VC te chu mipuite hnena awareness tha zawk nei turin a ngen.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian hmalak dan tur-action plan siama chumi hmang chuan kal zel dan tur sawi chhunzawm a tul tia rel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT LEVEL NASHA MUKHT BHARAT ABHIYAN COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1110/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 22th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl District Level Nasha Mukht Bharat Abhiyan Committee chu DC Pu K. Vanlalthiana kaihhruaiin Nasha Mukht Bharat Abhiyan (NMBA) Week leh International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking 2026 hman dan tur relin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.Khawzawl chhunga school hrang hrangah NMBA Poster/banner tar tura ruahman niin, Chhanchhuahna Home, Grace Camping Centre leh Kimkim Memorial Rehabilitation Centre-te tlawha tanpuina pek tura rel a ni bawk a. June 24, 2026 hian Mualvawm playground atangin DC Office thleng Rally zirlai naupangte nen neih tur a ni a, ruihhlo do chungchang Awareness campaign Govt Sialhawk High Schhol-ah neih tura tih a ni bawk a, High School leh Higher Secondary School zirlaite zingah Painting hmanga intihsiakna buatsaih a ni dawn bawk.June 25, 2026 hian International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking hun DC Conference Hall-ah hman tura rel a ni a. He hunah hian ruihhlo do chungchang Hlado Chhama inelna buatsaih a ni dawn a, Khawzawl SP hnen atangin Report on Narcotics and Drugs ngaihthlak a ni bawk ang.

Attachment

title: DC, MAMIT ORDER
content:
192/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 22th of June, 2026: In the interest of environmental protection and in pursuance of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026, and in compliance with the directions contained in para 10 of Supreme Court Order on Civil Appeal No. 6174/2023 dated 05.05.2026, the use, sale, distribution, storage, and littering of Single-Use Plastics (SUPs) are hereby prohibited within all identified tourist sites and other locations with high visitor footfall in Mamit District, with immediate effect.

All tourists, vendors, shopkeepers, stall operators, event organizers, and visitors are encouraged to adopt environmentally friendly alternatives such as cloth bags, paper bags, bamboo products, areca leaf products, metal utensils, and other biodegradable materials.

All Village Councils, line departments, shopkeepers, vendors, tourists, and members of the public are directed to strictly comply with this Notification. The concerned authorities shall undertake necessary awareness, monitoring, and enforcement measures to ensure effective implementation of the ban.

Any person found violating this Notification shall be liable for action under the provisions of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 and other applicable laws, rules, and regulations

This Notification shall come into force with immediate effect and shall remain in force until further orders.

DC order english (1).pdf

Attachment

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan a bial chhungah school naupang pheikhawk sem chhunzawm
content:
1109/2026-2027

Aizawl the 22nd June, 2026:Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Aizawl West II bialtu MLA ni bawk chuan vawiin khan a bial chhung Mizoram Institute of Comprehensive Education (MICE), Tuikual North-ah Primary School Section tan naupang uniform pheikhawk 139 a sem chhunzawm.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan sawrkar sikulah zirna a tha a; a bikin pawl sang lamah sawkar school-a luh kan intihhmuh a, kan inchuh nasat hle laiin a pawl hniam lamah erawh luh loh kan intihhmuh thung, a ti a. Sawrkar school te hi a belh tlak a, a rintlak a, a tha tawk tih mipuiin an hriat a duh tih a sawi a ni. Bialtu MLA chuan a bial chhunga sawrkar school te tihchangtlunna atan pheikhawk semin bul a tan a, thildang pawh tih zel a tum tih vawiin programme ah hian a sawi bawk.

MICE zirtirtute hnathawh a taka a hmu chu Minister chuan lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, thahnemngai leh taima taka, hmasawn lehzual tuma thawk turin a fuih a ni.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hian June ni 17, 2026 (Nilaini) atang khan Primary School zirlaite bun tur uniform pheikhawk hi a sem tan a, tun tum hi a thawh thumna leh a hnuhnung ber a ni. Hetihian, Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan a bial chhung school pariatah pheikhawk bun 683 a sem chhuak ta a ni.

Bialtu MLA pheikhawk sem programme ah hian zirtirtu leh zirlaite bakah Tuikual North Local Council te leh zirlai nu leh pate an tel a ni.

title: Legal Metrology in MRP aia sanga hralh tui bottle man
content:
1108/2026-2027

Aizawl the 22nd June, 2026:June 18 leh 19, 2026 khan Legal Metrology Enforcement chuan Aizawla dawr 13 an endik a. Mineral water bottle "SURE" tih hmingpu chu an hralh to avangin bur 672 an man. Water bottle ₹ 8/- man chu ₹ 10/-, ₹ 15/- man chu ₹ 20/- in sumdawngte hian an zuar a, Rule 18 (2) of the Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities)Rules, 2011 a kalh avangin thubuai siamsak niin dan anga hrem zui tur an ni ang.

Heng mineral bottle te hi Reliance Consumer Products Limited, Mumbai, Maharastra siam lakluh an ni hlawm.

Legal Metrology chuan thuchhuah siamin India ram chhungah thil fun  (Packaged item) chi reng reng a hralh theihna sang ber (Maximum Retail Price) aia sanga hralh hi phal a ni lova, dan bawhchhia an awm a nih chuan Office of the Controller of Legal Metrology, MINECO, Khatla ah emaw District office hrang hrangah report theih reng an ni.

Attachment

title: BIS, Guwahati leh FCS&CA Department ten PWD Officer-te tan Capacity Building Programme an buatsaih
content:
1107/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 22 June 2026 :Chief Secretary kaihhruai ‘State Level Standardisation Committee’ Thutkhawm hnuhnung berin a lo rel tawh bawhzuiin, vawin khan Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Guwahati leh FCS&CA Department tangkawp chuan, Mizorama PWD Officer-te tan ni hnih awh ‘Capacity Building on Standardization & Quality Control Program’ chu PWD E-in-C Office Conference Hall, Tuikhuahtlangah an buatsaih.

He hunah hian Pu jacob Biakliana, Inspector, FCS&CA Department chuan thusawiin, Mizoram State tana Committee for Standardisation, Quality Control and Quality Systems pawimawhna, Committee nihphung leh a tum berte a sawifiah a. Committee-in a rel angin Mizoram Sawrkar hnuaia Department hrang hrangte nena Capacity Building Programme neih chu Sawrkarin a ngaipawimawh hle tih tarlangin, Capacity Building Programme an hman chuan Sawrkar Department hrang hrangteah rah duhawm tak chhuahin hmasawnnna hlawkthlak tak thlen ngei se a tih thu a sawi a. Programme chu hlawkpui ngei tum theuh turin kalkhawmte chu duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Vawiin programme-ah hian BIS Guwahati atanga mithiam thlanchhuah bik pahnih – Dr. Anuj Verma, Assistant Professor, RIMT leh Dr. Aaditya Pratap, Assistant Professor, IIT, Benaras Hindu University atanga lo kalte chuan thupui thlanchhuah bik hrang hrang 14-te hmangin kalkhawmte hi zirhona PPT presentation nen an neihpui a. Mizoram PWD hnuaia Senior Executive Engineer chin zawng zawngte Mizoram hmun hrang hrang atangin mi 60 lai Programme-ah hian an tel thei a ni.

PWD officer-te nena hun an hman zawhah hian Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Guwahati leh FCS&CA Department-te hian Mizoram Sorkar hnuaia PHED officer-te nen Capacity Building Programme hi ni 2 chhung dang hmangho leh turin ruahmanna an siam a ni.

Attachment

title: VB-G RAM G orientation programme Siaha-ah neih a ni
content:
1106/2026-2027

Siaha the 22nd June 2026:July Ni 1, 2026 atanga MGNREGA thlaktu tura Sawrkar in a duan VB-G RAM G orientation programme chu vawiin khan DRRC, DRDO, Siaha-ah neih a ni a, Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte, District Bawrhsap leh Pu M Misael, Project Director, DRDO ten thusawina an nei.

District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan India in kum 2047 a Hmasawn Ram (Developed Country) nih a tumna kal zela hmalakna pakhat VB-G RAM G chungchang District Level official-te tana inhrilhhriatna programme a tel te chu lawmthu a hrilh a, kum 20 chuang hret MGNREGS chu kalpui a nih tawh hnuah tawha her rem ngaite her rem a, mipuite tana tangkai lehzual tura siam VB-G RAM G duan a ni chu a lawmawm hle a ti. ‘Mizoram chhim tawpa chengte pawh he Vikshit Bharat 2047 suangtuahna ah kan tel vek a, state dang leh ram dangte ruala hmasawnna hmel kan hmuh ve theihna turin department hrang hrangte thawhhona (convergence) tha neih a pawimawh’ a ti a, thahnemngai taka thawkho tura chahin scheme thar chu tha taka hman a nih theih nan duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Pu M Misael, PD DRPO pawhin kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu a sawi a, MGNREGs ah DC chu District Programme Coordinator  a ni a, VB-G RAM G ah pawh a chairmanna hnuaiah District Level Screening Committee din tur a nih thu tarlangin a tawiawmna a ngen nghal a ni. VB-G RAM G hman tan a nih dan leh Dan a siam a nih tak dante tarlangin Vawiin orientation programme chu interactive taka hman nise a duh thu a sawi a, hriat chian loh te zawt hrehlo turin leh hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan kalkhawmte thawhopuiah a sawm bawk a ni.

Pu AZ Beisia, ARDO, DRDO Siaha chuan he hun hi a kaihruai a, Pu C Lalremruata, WM, DRDO Siaha hnen atangin VBGRAMG chungchanga hriattur tul leh pawimawhte PowerPoint presentation hmanga ngaihthlak ho a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT BAWRHSAP THUCHHUAH
content:
1105/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 22th of June, 2026 :Environment humhalhna atan leh Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 leh Civil Appeal No. 6174/2023 dated 05.05.2026-a Supreme Court Order para 10-na in a sawi ang in, Single-Use Plastics (SUPs) hmanga siam bungrua reng reng Mamit District chhunga tourist site hrang hrang leh Vantlang hmun lun laiah te hman, hralh, semdarh, dahkhawm leh paih khap tlat a ni a. He thupek hi chhuah anih ni atangin hman nghal tur a ni.

Khualzin, sumdawng, dawr neitu, event organiser leh Mamit District chhunga cheng zawng zawngte chu Single Use Plastic aiah environment tana tha zawk, entirnan. Puan, lehkha, mau leh kuhva hnah hmanga siam ip/bungrua leh thir hmanga siam, silfaia hman nawn leh theih leh TAWIHTHEI thil atanga siam dangte, hmang uar zawk tura hriattir an ni e.

Mamit District chhunga Village Council zawng zawng. Sawrkar pisa, dawr neitu, khualzinte leh mipui zawng zawng te chu he thupek hi zawm tlat tura hriattir an ni a. He thupek kaihhnawiha thuneitute chu mipui hnenah a zau thei ang bera lo puangzara endikna lo kalpui tur leh thupek zawmna kawnga hmalakna hrang hrangte kalpui tur a hriattir an ni bawk e.

He thupek zawmlo apiang chu Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 leh a kaihhnawih dan dang hmanga hremna pek theih an ni ang.

DC thupek.pdf

Attachment

title: 1ST IR BATTALION HNUAIA STATE DISASTER RESPONSE FORCE (SDRF) TEN REFRESHER COURSE AN NEI
content:
1104/2026-2027

Mualvum, 22nd June, 2026:Chhiatrupna (disaster) chi hrang hrang thleng thei laka chhanchhuah hna tha leh chak zawka kalpui a nih theih nan, vawiin khan 1st IR Battalion, Mualvum hnuaia State Disaster Response Force (SDRF) te chuan intuaitharna (Refresher Course) an nei.

He SDRF Refresher Course hi 1st IR Bn Commandant, Pu M.S. Dawngkima chuan a hmanpui a. Commandant chuan thu sawiin, chhiatrupna chu engtik hunah pawh thleng thei reng a nih avangin SDRF mi leh sate chuan an thiamna leh theihnate belhchhahin an intuaihriam reng a ngai a, chumi atana he hun pawh hi buatsaih a nih thu a sawi. Mipuiten puih an ngaih huna rang taka che chhuak thei reng tura inbuatsaih thin turin SDRF, 1st IR Bn te chu a chah bawk a ni.

Vawiin intuaitharna hunah hian SDRF te hi a thu (theory) leh a taka tih chhinna (practical) hmangin training neihpui an ni a, chhiatrupna thlen thulha hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte an zirho a ni.

Attachment

title: Consumer Welfare Corpus Fund 2026: Proposals Invited to Promote Consumer Awareness and Rural Empowerment in Mizoram
content:
191/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial the 22ndJune, 2026: The Office of the District Civil Supplies Officer, Hnahthial, has invited proposals for financial assistance under the Mizoram Consumer Welfare (Corpus) Fund in accordance with the Mizoram Consumer Welfare Fund Guidelines, 2022. Eligible organizations and individuals are encouraged to submit projects aimed at enhancing consumer literacy, education, rural consumer empowerment, and other consumer welfare-related activities. Priority will be given to initiatives benefiting rural and disadvantaged consumers. Proposals must be submitted online tofcsamizoram@gmail.comon or before3rdJuly, 2026. Detailed guidelines and application formats are available atfcsca.mizoram.gov.in.

NOTICE

In line with the Mizoram Consumer Welfare Fund Guidelines, 2022, proposals are invited for financial assistance from the Consumer Welfare (Corpus) Fund to support projects aimed at promoting consumers' welfare. Eligibles entitles/individuals are encouraged to submit proposals focused on consumer literacy, education, rural consumer empowerment, and other related activities.

Key Guidelines:

1. Proposals should align with the objectives of the Mizoram Consumer Welfare Fund Guidelines, 2022.

2. Priority will be given to projects, especially those benefiting rural and disadvantaged consumers.

3. Eligible applicants will be as per the guidelines.

4. No financial grants under any circumstances shall be disbursed to any NGO without obtaining a unique ID no. generated from NGO Darpan Portal of Niti Aayog.

Submission Details:

Proposals must be submitted online to the department's email address:<59>fcsamizoram@gmail.com

Last date for submission of proposal:03.07.2026

For detailed guidelines and application format, please log on tofcsca.mizoram.gov.in

Attachment
